---
name: Engineering Task
about: Standard template for developers to track engineering tasks and refactor cards.
title: 'chore/refactor(scope): [Short Summary of Task]'
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Description
Provide a clear description of the task goals.

## 2. Technical Scope
List the files and components affected:
*   [ ] `backend/apps/...`
*   [ ] `frontend/src/app/...`

## 3. Sub-Tasks Checklist
*   [ ] Sub-task 1
*   [ ] Sub-task 2

## 4. Acceptance Criteria
Define what must be true for this task to be considered complete:
1. Criteria A
2. Criteria B

## 5. Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] Automated tests written and passing.
- [ ] Integration and boundary checks verified.
- [ ] Code style and conventions follow the Engineering Handbook.
